rationale: Defined supporting types (Ordering, KeyTrait, VerusClone, AbstractEndPoint, EndPoint, KeyIterator, DelegationMap) locally with open spec view/valid. Proof block guards on the antecedent, then for each key k uses KeyIterator::new_spec(k) as the witness to derive pointwise equality of post1@ and post2@. With valid() => dom().is_full(), map extensional equality (=~=) closes to view equality, which then implies struct equality via DelegationMap.m. Verus exits 0 with 1 verified, 0 errors.
